recommendations.title: The Sweet Escape
recommendations.overview: Michel, a fifty year old man, graphic designer, decides to change the urban lifestyle and go on an adventure. Fascinated by airmail, he dreams at Jean Mermoz when he's on scooter. One day, Michel sees a picture of a kayak.

recommendations.title: The Invisible Witness
recommendations.overview: Adriano wakes up in a hotel room next to the dead body of his lover, Laura. The door is locked from the inside and there is no evidence of anybody else in the room.

recommendations.title: Josephine
recommendations.overview: Josephine doesn't like her job and keeps on having relationships without a future. Her sister and parents keep pushing her to find a good husband. To shut them up, she creates a handsome Brazilian millionaire but her little white lie has a flip side

recommendations.title: Making a Living
recommendations.overview: A swindler scams a newspaper reporter-photographer and then, not realizing where the man is employed, applies for a job at his newspaper.

recommendations.title: Badla
recommendations.overview: A dynamic young entrepreneur finds herself locked in a hotel room with the corpse of her dead lover. She hires a prestigious lawyer to defend her and they work together to figure out what actually happened.

recommendations.title: Let the Sunshine In
recommendations.overview: Isabelle, Parisian artist, divorced mother, is looking for love, true love, at last.

recommendations.title: The Killers
recommendations.overview: A hit man and his partner try to find out why their latest victim, a former race-car driver, did not try to get away.

recommendations.title: Door Lock
recommendations.overview: Kyung-min lives alone in a one-room apartment. One day, she finds traces of a stranger breaking into her room and soon a mysterious murder case begins to unravel.

recommendations.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
